title: Forever: sample landing template
desc: Demonstration landing page. All text is sample (dummy) content.

sections.sub: Forever plans every detail, from venue to last dance, so you can be fully present on the day that matters most.
One team for the whole journey, from the first idea to the final thank-you note.
cards: We shape your vision and carry it through every decision and date.
On the day itself we run the timeline so you simply enjoy it.
A curated network of florists, caterers and photographers we love.
We find and secure the place that fits your style and budget.
Cohesive looks, from table settings to the smallest paper detail.
Clear numbers and gentle guidance so nothing surprises you later.

sections.text: We start with what you dream of, then turn it into a clear timeline, a realistic budget and a team that makes it real.
bullets: A mood and style we shape together
Vendors matched to your taste and budget

sections.text: When the date arrives, you are a guest at your own wedding. We hold the timeline, the vendors and every little fire so you never have to.
bullets: A detailed run-of-show for the whole day
One coordinator your guests can turn to
Quiet problem-solving you never even notice

sections.sub: No spreadsheets, no stress, no late-night worry.
steps: Share your date, your dreams and what matters most to you.
Venue, vendors and timeline come together around your vision.
Walk down the aisle while we take care of the rest.

sections.quote: Forever turned a year of decisions into something we actually enjoyed. On the day we just held hands and watched it all unfold perfectly.
sections.author: Sample Couple

sections.sub: Pick the support you need. Every package is tailored after we meet.

items: How far ahead should we book?
Most couples reach out nine to twelve months before, but we happily take on shorter timelines too.
Do you work with our venue?
Yes. We work at any venue you love and can also help you find the right one.
Can you stay within our budget?
Absolutely. We build a clear budget early and guide every choice to protect it.
Do you handle the vendors for us?
We source, book and manage every vendor, so you have one point of contact throughout.
What happens on the wedding day?
We run the full timeline on-site, so you and your families can simply be present.

sections.sub: Tell us about your day and we will show you how calm wedding planning can feel.

sections.tagline: Thoughtful wedding planning, from first idea to last dance. Sample dummy brand for template preview.
sections.copyright: // Forever is a sample template with dummy content
